title: ReLIFE
sourceNotes: Cumulative episodes across the 2016 ONA series (13) + the 2018 OVA finale 'Kanketsu-hen / Final Arc' (4, eps 14-17) = 17 total, one continuous story. Manga complete: 222 numbered chapters ('Reports') by Yayoiso; AniList's 238 count includes the volume 15 epilogue and bonus chapters. The TV/ONA series ends at roughly chapter 108 (the school-festival 'Confession'); the four-episode OVA compresses the entire remainder (ch 109 to the ending). The internal eps 7/8 chapter split is approximate. No theatrical anime film exists (the 2017 live-action film is a separate continuity).

mappings.arc: First Semester & Midterm Exams (the experiment begins)
Final Arc (OVA): Second Semester, Hishiro Resolution, Graduation & Finale
